seo.title: How We Score Ideas | Fly Labs
seo.description: The Ideas Lab finds real problems from {{sourceCount}} sources, asks {{questionCount}} questions, validates against X and Reddit, and gives a verdict. Here's how.

steps.validateDesc: Live evidence from X and Reddit

questions.title: The {{count}} questions
questions.subtitle: Each idea gets scored on these questions. The total is the FL score (0-100). That's the only score that decides the verdict.
questions.q2: Is there room for something new?

validation.title: Validation Layer
validation.description: Top-scoring ideas get validated against real conversations on X and Reddit.

experts.title: Want more depth?
experts.subtitle: {{count}} expert perspectives add angles the FL score doesn't cover. They live on each idea's detail page but don't affect the verdict.

dyor.title: Do your own research
dyor.text: AI scores are opinions based on data. Good opinions, but opinions. Talk to real users before building.
